title: cytisus supinus var. virens
intro: Cytisus supinus var. virens, also known as the Scotch broom or virens broom, is a variety of the broom plant, which is a flowering shrub native to Europe. The medicinal properties of Cytisus supinus var. virens include its ability to act as a diuretic, helping to reduce swelling and fluid retention, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce the risk of heart disease, improve circulation, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats. Cytisus supinus var. virens is often used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, as well as in the production of extracts and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity and side effects.
